name: SLICK Quant
description: Hyperliquid microstructure node. Polls the hyperliquid-operator CLI for real-time CL-USDC order book depth, funding rates, and recent liquidation cascades. Exposes structured liquidity data to the Orchestrator.

skills.name: Get CL-USDC Liquidity
skills.description: Returns available liquidity, current funding rate, and recent liquidation volume for the CL-USDC perpetual on Hyperliquid.
